governance_requirements.text: Every test specification MUST have stable identity, version, requirement references and change history.
A test MUST describe observable behavior and evidence without requiring one vendor, model, database or UI.
Mandatory behavior requires positive and negative coverage where meaningful.
MUST NOT and SHOULD NOT requirements require adversarial or misuse coverage.
Tests MUST preserve counterexamples and Inconclusive outcomes.
Every execution MUST record preconditions, environment and applicable Profile.
Every execution MUST identify synthetic, internal, restricted personal or other governed evidence class.
A test specification MUST NOT require real identifiable affected-person data when synthetic or de-identified evidence is sufficient.
Expected outcomes MUST distinguish system behavior, record state, user-visible behavior and evidence.
Failure MUST identify violated expectation, affected scope and required containment.
Blocked MUST identify missing dependency, owner and next condition.
Inconclusive MUST preserve uncertainty and MUST NOT be counted as Pass.
A result becomes Invalidated when material test, implementation, environment or source changes break comparability.
Time-sensitive test evidence MUST expire or be re-run.
Each object state machine MUST test allowed, forbidden, expiry, appeal and concurrency behavior where applicable.
Tests MUST detect process stages incorrectly stored as object states.
Derived records and decisions MUST be traceable to source and transformation history.
Correction tests MUST inspect active, derived, indexed, shared and future-use effects.
Rights-request tests MUST inspect primary, derived, shared and backup completion or bounded exception.
Handoff tests MUST distinguish initiation, acknowledgment, acceptance, failure and closure.
High-impact tests MUST demonstrate actual human authority, information and stop capacity.
Applicable tests MUST assess whether notice, correction, refusal and appeal are usable.
Applicable tests MUST include language, disability, literacy, bandwidth and private-contact constraints.
Safety and representative tests MUST include operator or representative as possible source of harm.
Resource tests MUST include stale, disputed, inaccessible and unavailable conditions.
Public-claim tests MUST compare exact wording to current evidence and status.
A passing self-run test suite MUST NOT be represented as independent certification.
Test specification, execution, review and conformance decision MUST remain distinct records.
Automated and controlled tests SHOULD record enough environment detail for bounded reproduction.
Test infrastructure and artifacts MUST protect secrets, personal data and restricted evidence.
Material changes require targeted regression and affected-claim review.
Publishing KERNEL-0005 or its derived catalog MUST NOT imply that any test was executed.

tests.title: KCR-0001 verification specification
procedure: Construct a bounded case matching the requirement scope.
Execute permitted behavior and record state, user-visible behavior and evidence.
Execute a negative, boundary or misuse case where meaningful.
Inspect provenance, affected-person impact, authority, audit and downstream effects.
tests.expected_outcome: Required behavior is traceable; failure or uncertainty remains visible and cannot be counted as Pass.

tests.expected_outcome: Required behavior is traceable; failure or uncertainty remains visible and cannot be counted as Pass.

scenario_suites.name: ThirdPartyStatement
scenario_suites.boundary: A parent or professional statement remains attributed and contestable.

scenario_suites.name: RefusalWithoutPenalty
scenario_suites.boundary: Silence, disagreement or withdrawal is not agreement or adverse identity evidence.

scenario_suites.name: RepresentativeConflict
scenario_suites.boundary: A representative who may be the harm source cannot authorize and close the action.

scenario_suites.name: CorrectionPropagation
scenario_suites.boundary: Correction updates active, derived, indexed and future uses while retaining lineage.

scenario_suites.name: SourceLoss
scenario_suites.boundary: A derived conclusion without lineage becomes restricted or invalid.

scenario_suites.name: UncertainAdvice
scenario_suites.boundary: Material uncertainty slows, narrows or escalates advice.

scenario_suites.name: HiddenPersuasion
scenario_suites.boundary: Anxiety, shame, urgency and dependency are not used for consent, purchase or retention.

scenario_suites.name: UnavailableHandoff
scenario_suites.boundary: A generated resource or sent message is not accepted service.

scenario_suites.name: EmergencyTemporaryAction
scenario_suites.boundary: Protective action is necessary, proportionate, time-bounded and reviewable.

scenario_suites.name: DeletionWithBackup
scenario_suites.boundary: Deletion addresses primary, derived, shared and backup behavior.

scenario_suites.name: RiskProfileExpiry
scenario_suites.boundary: Temporary risk state does not become permanent identity.

scenario_suites.name: SecondaryUse
scenario_suites.boundary: Sensitive data cannot silently enter analytics, training or marketing.

scenario_suites.name: AIDisclosure
scenario_suites.boundary: AI role, limitations and provider/version remain visible.

scenario_suites.name: HumanAccountability
scenario_suites.boundary: Named human has actual information, authority and stop capacity.

scenario_suites.name: ParticipationImpossible
scenario_suites.boundary: Unsafe or inaccessible participation receives explicit handling.

scenario_suites.name: InvalidTransition
scenario_suites.boundary: Undefined object transition is rejected.

scenario_suites.name: ProcessStageConfusion
scenario_suites.boundary: Process stage is not stored as every object state.

scenario_suites.name: StaleResource
scenario_suites.boundary: Expired or disputed resource stops current presentation.

scenario_suites.name: IncidentAppeal
scenario_suites.boundary: Incident and appeal preserve independent review and reopening.

scenario_suites.name: ClaimExpiry
scenario_suites.boundary: Expired or changed evidence suspends the claim.

scenario_suites.name: CrossLanguage
scenario_suites.boundary: Translated labels preserve source status and distinctions.

scenario_suites.name: Accessibility
scenario_suites.boundary: Rights remain usable across language, disability and bandwidth.

scenario_suites.name: OperatorAsRisk
scenario_suites.boundary: System does not automatically side with the operator.

scenario_suites.name: PublicClaim
scenario_suites.boundary: Draft, Planned, Available and conforming language are not conflated.
